suggested_title: Alisa Sivapiromrat - MD Candidate at Harvard Medical School
prospect_notes: Alisa (Ally) Sivapiromrat is an MD candidate in the Pathways program at Harvard Medical School (approximately Class of 2028 or 2029). She graduated from Emory University in 2023 with a B.S. in Biology, where she conducted cystic fibrosis clinical research under Dr. Vin Tangpricha and studied abroad at the University of Oxford focusing on biomedical sciences and biochemistry. After Emory, she spent two years as a Post-baccalaureate CRTA Fellow at the National Cancer Institute (Thoracic and GI Malignancies Branch) under Dr. Arun Rajan, characterizing thymic adenocarcinoma and supporting clinical trials for rare thymic cancers. She is also a participant in the HMS Global Primary Care Student Scholars program, reflecting an interest in primary care and global health. Her research background spans cystic fibrosis, thoracic oncology, and clinical immunotherapy trials.

_enrichment.title: MD Candidate, Harvard Medical School Pathways Program
